titleStmt.title: SII 23.391: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 391. (A.R. No. 391 of 1907.) Maruttuvakkuḍi, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Airāvatēśvara temple—on the same wall [Rājarāja III] year 21: 1236-37 A.D.

summary.p: The assessment of some lands made in the 40th year of Periyadēvar Tribhuvanavīradēvar is referred to in this record also as in No. 389 above. This is dated in the 260th day of the regnal year quoted and is connected with No. 388 which is 14 days later. It is however curious to note that this earlier document is the actual uḷvari document of execution of the other record. Though the lacunae of the damaged portions of the latter are partly filled up by the present inscription a connected account of the transaction cannot be clearly made out. Of the two pieces of land granted as dēvadāṉa-iṟaiyili to the temple of Tiruviḍaikkuḷam-Uḍaiyār, one is stated to be situated in the village Irumarabuntūya perumāṉ-[chaturvēdimaṅgalam] in Kuṟumbūr-nāḍu and the other in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻaṉ-Nyāya-paripāla-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tiraimūr-nāḍu. In connection with each of these lands are also mentioned the villages Śembiyaṉ-Neṟkuppai a part of Tiraimūr alias Ulaguyyakkoṇḍaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Viḷai-nāḍu, a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu and Vikramaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam (No. 388) [in Tiraimūr-nāḍu?], from the accounts of which these lands are said to have been separated.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatiṉāl tevatāṉa
iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari . Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu Ā
ṉaiccūḻt tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyār yārkku
veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu vi
ḷaināṭṭut tiraimūrāṉa Ulakuyyakkoṇṭacoḻac caruppetimaṅkala
ttu niṉṟum cempiyaṉ neṟkuppai Eṉṟu veṟu Irukkiṟa nilattu
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattuk kuṟumpūr nāṭṭu Irumarapuntūya
perumāṉ caruppetimaṅkalatto(ṭ)ṭum kūṭina nilamāy māṟiṉa nilam nālmāvarai
ye Araikkāṇik kiḻaraikku tevarkku Iṟuttapaṭikku koyiṟkaṇak
kup perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi peṟukku Okka I
ṭaveṇṭum nilamāy Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭuk ku
lottuṅkacoḻaṉ niyāya paripālac caruppetimaṅkalattukka vikkirama coḻacca
ruppetimaṅkalattu niṉṟum kūṭiṉa nilattu tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyār tirunā
mattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattukku Ūrkaṇakku kaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻu
ttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi nilamāy yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉamutal te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭa Araiye nālu māmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi mu
ntirikaiyum yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉamutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyi
li Iṭṭapaṭikku Innilattukku Iṟaikaṭṭum niccayippum kaṇṭāl Eṟiṉa �
niccayittukoḷḷa yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉa
mutal veli Oṉṟukku nellu nūṟṟukkalamum Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kā
ṇikkaṭaṉ pattāṟākkiṉa nellukku Antarāyaṅ koḷvatu I
nnilattukku periyatevar tiripuvaṉaviratevarkku nāṟpatāvatu
varaiyil taṇṭa tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭiyile tarappaṭiy yi
ṭuvittu varukiṟa nel muppattoru kalaṉe Aiṅkuṟu
ṇiyum Ūril kaḻippatu . Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇanāyakam rkkiḻavaṉ Eḻu
tteṉṟum Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭip paṉaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻutte
puravuvari cikaraṇanāyakam purammalai Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai pu
ravuvari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi tiruviḷakkaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai puravu vari cikaraṇanāyakam
ṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi nallūruṭai
yāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai puravuvari cikaraṇanāyakam Ayaṇampākkiḻāṉ Eḻutte
ṉṟum Ivai pāṇṭiyarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai vecālipparaiyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum
yaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai
kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Eḻutiṉa Uḷvarippaṭikku kalveṭṭu ..
Digital edition of SII 23.391 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
